title: AB2X4 spinel structures: similarity and difference between the centrosymmetric, Fd-3m, and non-centrosymmetric, F4132, space groups
summary: Many compounds belonging to the spinel AB2X4 structure play an important role due to their wide range of practical applications. Most of them are traditionally assigned to the centrosymmetric space group Fd-3m. However, the physical properties of some spinels are incompatible with centrosymmetry. This discrepancy is often accounted for by reducing the symmetry to the non-centrosymmetric space group F-43m, allowing thus small atomic displacements from their original position in Fd-3m. In this work, we demonstrate that the loss of the inversion symmetry can occur without any atomic displacements, since the centrosymmetric Fd-3m and non-centrosymmetric F4132 space groups are equivalent for structure determination and refinement based on X-ray diffraction data. If consistent with experiment, only the use of an anharmonic model of atomic displacements can distinguish these space groups. This study aims to clarify certain misconceptions regarding the structural symmetry and physical properties of spinel type compounds.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，尖晶石AB2X4结构中，传统认为的中心对称空间群Fd-3m与非中心对称空间群F4132在X射线衍射结构解析和精修上是等价的，因此反演对称性的丧失可以在没有原子位移的情况下发生，只有非简谐原子位移模型才能区分两者。
AI.motivation: 许多尖晶石化合物的物理性质与中心对称性不相容，但传统上被归属于中心对称空间群Fd-3m，这种矛盾通常通过降低对称性到非中心对称空间群F-43m并用小原子位移来解释。本文旨在澄清关于尖晶石结构对称性的误解。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明中心对称空间群Fd-3m与非中心对称空间群F4132在X射线衍射结构测定和精修中完全等价；提出只有采用非简谐（anharmonic）原子位移模型才能区分这两种空间群。
AI.result: 证明了尖晶石结构中反演对称性的丧失可以在没有任何原子位移的情况下发生，因为Fd-3m和F4132在X射线衍射分析中等价。
AI.conclusion: 澄清了尖晶石类化合物结构对称性与物理性质之间关系的常见误解，强调在实验一致的情况下，需借助非简谐模型才能区分这两种空间群。

title: The structure of a melt: The case of liquid bismuth
summary: Molecular Dynamics (MD) is performed on supercells of 216 atoms of bismuth, going from 300 K to 573 K in 100 steps and maintaining it in the liquid state, at 573 K, during 500 steps using the Materials Studio (MS) suite of codes. The Pair Distribution Functions (PDFs) and the Plane Angle Distributions (PADs) of the last 1, 10, 25 and 100 steps of the MD have been obtained. Averaging the last 100 steps, as representative of the liquid, Reverse Monte Carlo (RMC) was applied to obtain 4 atomic structures, one for each set of initial random velocities. Then, a detailed structural study of liquid bismuth at 573 K was undertaken; PDFs and PADs are calculated and reported. Two noticeable peaks appear for the PDFs, at 3.25 and 6.55 Å, along with a pseudo peak (shoulder) at 4.6 Å. This shoulder (after the first peak) of the PDFs is found to be related to the third and fourth neighbor peaks of the crystalline Wyckoff structure and also to the diagonal distances in deformed squares in the liquid structure. For completeness J(r)s are also reported. Two prominent peaks in the MS PADs are observed: 53° and 85°; and two for the RMC PADs: 58° and 90°, suggesting the existence of deformed triangles and squares. Less abundant are higher-order geometrical structures.

AI.tldr: 利用分子动力学模拟和逆蒙特卡洛方法，研究了液态铋在573 K下的原子结构，发现了PDF中3.25 Å和6.55 Å的主峰及4.6 Å的肩峰，PAD中约53°-58°和85°-90°的角分布特征，揭示了液态铋中存在变形三角形和正方形等几何结构。
AI.motivation: 液态铋的微观结构对其物理化学性质有重要影响，但目前对其原子尺度的结构特征（尤其是短程和中程有序性）理解仍不充分，需要通过模拟方法进行深入的结构解析。
AI.method: 使用Materials Studio对216个铋原子的超胞进行MD模拟（300 K升温至573 K，液态保持500步），计算最后1、10、25、100步的PDF和PAD；对最后100步平均结构应用RMC方法得到4个原子结构，并进行PDF和PAD分析。
AI.result: PDF在3.25 Å和6.55 Å处有两个显著峰，4.6 Å处出现一个肩峰（与Wyckoff晶体结构中第三、四近邻及液态中变形正方形的对角线距离相关）；MS-PAD显示53°和85°两个主峰，RMC-PAD显示58°和90°两个主峰，表明存在变形三角形和正方形几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 液态铋在573 K下的短程结构主要由变形的三角形和正方形几何单元构成，PDF的肩峰反映了晶体到液态的结构演变特征，RMC方法有效验证了MD模拟的结构结果。

title: ChatMOSP: A Chemistry-Grounded Mobile Agent for Working-State Catalyst Simulations
summary: Catalytic nanoparticles restructure dynamically under reaction conditions, so their working morphology and activity are governed by temperature, pressure, and gas composition. However, converting experimentally specified environments into physically meaningful morphology-performance simulations remains difficult because the translation of reaction conditions into model-specific energetic, kinetic, and execution parameters requires the specialized knowledge in computational catalysis. Here we report ChatMOSP, a chemistry-grounded mobile scientific agent that translates natural-language and voice-expressed catalytic requests into parameter-validated simulations using the Multi-scale Operando Simulation Package. ChatMOSP maps catalyst identity, temperature, pressure, gas composition, and target observables onto multiscale structure reconstruction and kinetic Monte Carlo tasks, retrieves database parameters or constructs missing inputs from an online literature-retrieval workflow, and executes validated MOSP workflows. Using CO oxidation on Pd nanoparticles as an example, we verify the ChatMOSP simulations capture the temperature-induced transition from faceted to rounded morphologies observed by in-situ TEM experiments either by built-in database or from web-retrieved literature information when the parameters are absent. Moreover, we demonstrate the capability of ChatMOSP to perform end-to-end study at mobile devices to simulate a pressure-coverage-morphology-activity feedback cycle for Pt CO oxidation to interpret the oscillatory CO conversion. These results establish ChatMOSP as a physically constrained mobile agent for accessible and interpretable catalyst working-state simulations.

AI.tldr: ChatMOSP是一个化学移动科学智能体，能将自然语言描述的催化实验条件自动转化为多尺度操作模拟，实现从反应条件到催化剂形貌-性能仿真的端到端自动化。
AI.motivation: 催化纳米颗粒在反应条件下会动态重构，但将实验指定的反应条件（温度、压力、气体组成）转化为有物理意义的形貌-性能仿真非常困难，因为需要计算催化领域的专业知识来设置模型参数。
AI.method: ChatMOSP移动科学智能体，支持自然语言和语音输入，自动将催化剂身份、温度、压力、气体组成和目标观测映射到多尺度结构重建和动力学蒙特卡洛任务，通过内置数据库或在线文献检索获取参数，并执行验证后的MOSP工作流。
AI.result: 以Pd纳米颗粒上的CO氧化为例，ChatMOSP模拟捕捉到了原位TEM实验观察到的温度诱导的从刻面到圆形的形貌转变；以Pt CO氧化为例，在移动设备上完成了端到端的压力-覆盖度-形貌-活性反馈循环模拟，解释了振荡CO转化现象。
AI.conclusion: ChatMOSP建立了一个具有物理约束的移动科学智能体，为催化剂的工况模拟提供了可访问且可解释的解决方案。

title: Physics-Guided Concentration Inference from Resistance Transients in a Mixed-Phase SnO-SnO$_2$ Carbon Monoxide Sensor with p-n Switching
summary: This work presents a physics-guided machine-learning framework for carbon monoxide concentration inference from experimentally measured resistance transients of a mixed-phase SnO-SnO$_2$ material gas sensor exhibiting temperature-dependent p-n switching behavior. Cycle-level transient responses are represented through physically interpretable descriptors and complemented by compact fast Fourier transform (FFT) and discrete wavelet transform (DWT)-based summaries. Using leakage-aware grouped cross-validation, we study both multi-class concentration classification and continuous concentration regression for the p-type and n-type sensing regimes separately. Across both regimes, fused features provide the strongest overall performance, while the physics-guided descriptor block remains highly competitive, indicating that the dominant concentration information is already encoded in physically meaningful transient dynamics. The p-type branch shows the best concentration-class discrimination, with the fused Random Forest classifier reaching approximately $96.5\%$ accuracy, whereas the n-type branch yields the best quantitative concentration estimation, with the fused Random Forest regressor achieving an MAE$\approx 1.48$ ppm and an R$^2$ $\approx 0.992$. These results reveal a clear dual-regime behavior: p-type sensing is particularly favorable for classification, whereas n-type sensing is more favorable for high-fidelity regression. More broadly, the study demonstrates that leakage-aware, cycle-level, physics-guided machine learning can extend conventional gas-sensing analysis beyond single-response metrics while preserving physical interpretability

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理引导的机器学习框架，利用SnO-SnO₂混合相气体传感器在p-n切换行为下的电阻瞬态信号来推断一氧化碳浓度。通过物理可解释描述符结合FFT和DWT特征，研究发现p型传感适合浓度分类（准确率约96.5%），n型传感适合连续浓度回归（MAE≈1.48 ppm, R²≈0.992），并通过泄漏感知分组交叉验证确保了评估的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统气体传感器分析依赖单点响应指标，难以充分利用传感器瞬态响应中蕴含的丰富信息，特别是对于具有温度依赖p-n切换行为的混合相材料。作者希望建立一种既能保持物理可解释性，又能超越传统单响应指标的分析框架。
AI.method: 采用物理引导的机器学习框架：1）从SnO-SnO₂混合相气体传感器的电阻瞬态信号中提取周期级物理可解释描述符；2）结合紧凑FFT和DWT特征作为补充；3）对p型和n型传感模式分别进行多类浓度分类和连续浓度回归；4）使用泄漏感知分组交叉验证防止数据泄漏。
AI.result: 融合特征整体表现最强，但物理引导描述符本身也具有很强竞争力。p型分支的最佳分类准确率约96.5%（融合随机森林），n型分支的最佳回归效果为MAE≈1.48 ppm、R²≈0.992（融合随机森林）。揭示了p型适合分类、n型适合回归的双重传感模式。
AI.conclusion: 泄漏感知、周期级、物理引导的机器学习能够超越传统单响应指标分析，扩展气体传感分析的边界，同时保持物理可解释性。不同传感模式在分类和回归任务上具有明确的分工优势。

title: Towards terahertz excitons in hydrogenated graphene superlattices
summary: Carbon nanostructures, such as nanotubes and graphene nanoribbons, exhibit unique electronic and optical properties that make them very promising candidates for terahertz components. However, carbon nanotube and nanoribbon monolithic on-chip integration is challenging because it may results in significant change of their intrinsic properties after an embedment into a substrate. We investigate with first principles theoretical methods the successful routes of such integration and calculate electronic and optical properties of the integrated structures -- two-dimensional graphene superlattices, where quasi-metallic and dielectric regions alternate by selective hydrogenation of graphene. It is shown that chemical engineering of the graphene surface can lead to strong and well-isolated excitonic absorption peaks in the far-infrared and possibly even terahertz frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了选择性氢化石墨烯形成的二维超晶格结构，发现这种化学工程方法可在远红外乃至太赫兹频段产生强且孤立的激子吸收峰，为碳纳米结构在太赫兹器件中的单片集成提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: 碳纳米管和石墨烯纳米带等碳纳米结构具有优异的电子和光学特性，是很有前途的太赫兹元件候选材料。然而，碳纳米管和纳米带的单片式片上集成面临挑战，因为嵌入基底后其本征性质会发生显著改变，因此需要探索成功的集成路线。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理理论方法，研究通过选择性氢化石墨烯形成准金属区和介电区交替的二维石墨烯超晶格结构，并计算其电子和光学性质。
AI.result: 化学工程处理石墨烯表面可以在远红外乃至太赫兹频率范围内产生强且良好孤立的激子吸收峰。
AI.conclusion: 选择性氢化石墨烯是一种有效的单片集成路线，可使碳纳米结构在保持其本征特性的同时实现太赫兹频段的光电应用。

title: Ultrafast Magneto-optical Fingerprints of Altermagnetism in MnTe
summary: Recently identified altermagnets exhibit a distinctive dual-space nature: they possess spin-split electronic bands akin to ferromagnets in momentum space while maintaining the fully compensated magnetization of antiferromagnets in real space. This inherent duality, originating from the same crystal symmetry, gives rise to various intriguing physical phenomena unique to altermagnets. Consequently, a robust and efficient experimental signature capable of revealing this dual character is critically needed. The magneto-optical Kerr and Voigt effects, given their high sensitivity to ferromagnetism and antiferromagnetism, respectively, are ideally suited to probe this duality. Here, using time-resolved pump-probe magneto-optical measurements, we report the coexistence of pronounced Kerr and Voigt effects in the altermagnet MnTe. Combining the magnetization measurement and first-principles calculations, we demonstrate that the Kerr effect originates from the intrinsic Berry curvature of altermagnetism distribution in momentum space, while the Voigt effect arises from an anisotropic permittivity induced by the in-plane Néel order in real space, directly revealing the dual-space nature of altermagnets. Furthermore, the transient Kerr signal exhibits faster relaxation dynamics than the transient Voigt signal, underscoring their distinct origins in Berry curvature and Néel order, respectively. These findings establish transient magneto-optical responses as distinctive fingerprints of altermagnetism and position altermagnets as promising platforms for manipulating magneto-optical phenomena in ultrafast spin optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过时间分辨泵浦-探测磁光测量，首次在交变磁体MnTe中同时观测到Kerr效应和Voigt效应，揭示了其动量空间自旋劈裂与实空间完全补偿磁化的双重特性，并确立了超快磁光响应作为交变磁性的独特指纹。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体兼具铁磁体能带自旋劈裂和反铁磁体净零磁化的双重特性，但缺乏能够同时揭示这两种特性的高效实验探测手段。因此，亟需一种稳健的实验指纹来表征交变磁体的双重空间本质。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨泵浦-探测磁光测量，结合磁化测量与第一性原理计算，在交变磁体MnTe中同时分析Kerr效应和Voigt效应的来源与动力学行为。
AI.result: 在MnTe中同时观测到显著的Kerr效应和Voigt效应；Kerr效应源于动量空间中交变磁性本征贝里曲率，Voigt效应源于实空间面内Néel序诱导的各向异性介电常数；瞬态Kerr信号的弛豫动力学快于Voigt信号。
AI.conclusion: 瞬态磁光响应可作为交变磁体的独特特征指纹，交变磁体为超快自旋光电子学中操控磁光现象提供了有前景的平台。

title: Modelling the photocatalytic oxidation of methane and other air pollutants for applications in ventilation systems
summary: Photocatalytic oxidation (PCO) is a promising strategy for indoor air purification and outdoor pollutant abatement, potentially offering treatment for climate- and health-relevant pollutants such as methane (CH$_4$), nitrogen oxides (NO$_\text{x}$) and volatile organic compounds (VOCs). In this work, we present experiments evaluating the PCO of CH$_4$ (2 to 10 ppm) under varying UV-C light intensities (4 to 59 W/m$^2$), using titanium dioxide (TiO$_2$) as the photocatalyst. At 2 ppm CH$_4$, TiO$_2$ achieves a maximum conversion efficiency of 24.4% and a maximum apparent quantum yield of $0.013$\% over the tested UV-C light intensities, demonstrating activity at environmentally relevant concentrations. We develop a model to interpret the experimental results and assess the potential of PCO for ventilation applications. The model is validated against our CH$_4$ data and literature results for formaldehyde (HCHO) and NO$_\text{x}$. While laboratory-scale configurations achieve high conversions (e.g., 24.4% for CH$_4$), ventilation-scale performance is predicted to be limited by thin concentration boundary layers and short residence times, with conversion efficiencies dropping to around $0.017$%. Finally, we estimate the climate impact of CH$_4$ removal in terms of CO$_2$e emission rates, demonstrating that TiO$_2$-based PCO in ventilation applications can yield a net climate benefit (i.e., a net-negative CO$_2$e emissions rate) when the modelled CO$_2$e removal rate exceeds the emissions from catalyst material production and UV operation, particularly when pre-existing UV-C irradiation is leveraged.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了TiO₂光催化氧化在环境浓度下对甲烷的降解效果（最高转化率24.4%），建立了模型预测通风应用中的性能，发现实际通风场景转化率仅约0.017%，但在利用现有UV-C光源时可实现净气候效益。
AI.motivation: 评估光催化氧化（PCO）技术在环境相关浓度下去除甲烷等污染物的可行性，并量化其在通风应用中的实际潜力和气候影响。
AI.method: 实验测定TiO₂在UV-C光照下对2-10 ppm甲烷的PCO效率，建立传质-反应耦合模型，并用甲烷、甲醛和NOx数据验证，最后进行CO₂e排放分析。
AI.result: 2 ppm甲烷时最高转化率24.4%，表观量子产率0.013%；通风规模下转化率降至约0.017%；在利用现有UV-C光源时可实现净负CO₂e排放。
AI.conclusion: TiO₂-PCO在环境浓度下对甲烷有活性，但通风应用受边界层和停留时间限制导致效率极低；若能利用现有UV-C资源，仍可产生净气候效益。

title: Radiation conduction in polaritonic nanowires
summary: Phonon polaritons have attracted increasing interest as a means to offset the reduction in phonon thermal conductivity in nanostructures caused by enhanced boundary scattering. However, the interpretation of the limited experimental data on phonon polariton-mediated conduction is hindered by the lack of comprehensive full-wave models for predicting thermal electromagnetic transport in solid-state systems. Here, the radiative thermal conductivity in the diffusive regime along SiO2 nanowires near room temperature is predicted using the fluctuational electrodynamics-based discrete system Green's function method. At 400 K, for nanowire diameters of 66 nm and 132 nm, modest radiative conductivities of 0.0264 W/m-K and 0.0165 W/m-K, respectively, are obtained, with contributions dominated by surface phonon polaritons. In contrast, the kinetic theory combined with nanowire dispersion relations derived from Maxwell's equations predicts conductivities that can be nearly two orders of magnitude larger than those obtained from fluctuational electrodynamics, and are largely dominated by bulk phonon polaritons propagating within the nanowire volume. Improved agreement between the kinetic theory and fluctuational electrodynamics for the total radiative conductivity can be achieved by introducing an effective mean free path that accounts for the reduced mean free path of bulk phonon polaritons outside the Reststrahlen spectral bands of SiO2. However, even with this correction, the kinetic theory fails to accurately capture the spectral distribution of radiative conductivity. This work establishes a solid foundation for the development of phonon polariton-based systems for thermal management in micro/nanoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于涨落电动力学的离散系统格林函数法，预测了SiO2纳米线在近室温下的辐射热导率，发现其值远小于动力学理论预测值，表明动力学理论高估了声子极化子对热导的贡献。通过引入有效平均自由程可改善两者在总辐射热导率上的一致性，但动力学理论仍无法准确捕捉辐射热导率的频谱分布。
AI.motivation: 目前关于声子极化子介导热传导的有限实验数据缺乏全面的全波模型来预测固态系统中的热电磁输运，亟需建立可靠的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用基于涨落电动力学的离散系统格林函数法，预测SiO2纳米线在扩散输运区间的辐射热导率，并与基于麦克斯韦方程组导出的动力学理论进行对比。
AI.result: 400K时，直径66nm和132nm的纳米线辐射热导率分别为0.0264 W/m-K和0.0165 W/m-K，主要贡献来自表面声子极化子；动力学理论预测值比涨落电动力学方法高出近两个数量级，主要贡献来自体声子极化子。
AI.conclusion: 引入有效平均自由程可改善动力学理论在总辐射热导率上的预测，但无法准确反映频谱分布；该工作为微纳电子器件中基于声子极化子的热管理系统的开发奠定了坚实基础。

title: On the Fast Fourier Transform on SU(2)
summary: The special unitary group SU(2) plays a fundamental role in the description of symmetries in quantum mechanics, theoretical physics, and spherical signal processing. In this paper, we address the computational challenges of performing spectral analysis on this non-abelian compact Lie group. We present the Fourier Transform (FT) on SU(2) and develop a Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) algorithm inspired by the classical Cooley-Tukey divide-and-conquer scheme. Our approach efficiently discretizes the group using Euler angles, applying a two-dimensional FFT on the angular variables and exploiting the recursive properties of Jacobi polynomials. We provide an analysis of the computational complexity, demonstrating that our FFT-based method significantly outperforms the direct computation of the FT. This algorithm serves as a foundational tool for understanding the implementation of the FFT on SU(2), a key component in numerical simulations and advanced data analysis for high-performance computing applications on curved manifolds and quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Cooley-Tukey分治策略的SU(2)群快速傅里叶变换算法，利用欧拉角离散化和雅可比多项式递归性质，显著降低了谱分析的计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: SU(2)群在量子力学、理论物理和球面信号处理中至关重要，但其非阿贝尔紧致李群上的谱分析计算开销巨大，亟需高效的FFT算法来解决这一计算挑战。
AI.method: 采用欧拉角对SU(2)群进行离散化，对角度变量实施二维FFT，并利用雅可比多项式的递归性质，结合Cooley-Tukey分治策略设计快速算法。
AI.result: 计算复杂度分析表明，所提出的FFT算法在性能上显著优于直接计算傅里叶变换。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为理解SU(2)上的FFT实现提供了基础工具，适用于弯曲流形和量子系统中的高性能计算应用。

title: Supersymmetry Without Time-Reversal Invariance in Model A: A FRG perspective
summary: We show that, contrary to common belief, supersymmetry alone is not sufficient in Model A dynamics to ensure relaxation toward a stationary state satisfying time-reversal invariance (TRI). An additional condition on top of supersymmetry is required for TRI, which we analyze in detail. We explicitly construct a model that is supersymmetric but violates TRI, and argue that, at least perturbatively, TRI nevertheless emerges as an effective large-scale symmetry. Using the functional renormalization group (FRG), we further show that the dynamical effective action, $Γ[\varphi,\tilde\varphi]$, contains the derivative of the equilibrium effective action, $Γ^{\mathrm{eq}}[\varphi]$, whose renormalization-group flow is identical to that of the equilibrium theory order by order in the derivative expansion. Finally, extending the same line of reasoning, we show that the probability distribution of the total magnetization in the Ising model can be recovered within the Model A framework.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，在Model A动力学中，仅靠超对称性不足以确保系统弛豫到满足时间反演不变性的稳态，还需要额外条件。作者构建了超对称但破坏时间反演不变性的模型，并证明时间反演不变性在大尺度下可作为有效对称性出现。通过泛函重整化群，揭示了动力学有效作用量与平衡有效作用量的关系，并在Ising模型中恢复了总磁化强度的概率分布。
AI.motivation: 挑战"超对称性足以保证时间反演不变性"这一普遍认知，澄清在Model A动力学中实现时间反演不变性所需的条件。
AI.method: 通过显式构造反例模型，结合泛函重整化群分析，在导数展开下逐阶比较动力学有效作用量与平衡有效作用量的重整化群流。
AI.result: 超对称性并非时间反演不变性的充分条件；时间反演不变性在大尺度下作为有效对称性出现（至少在微扰论层面）；动力学有效作用量包含平衡有效作用量的导数，二者RG流在导数展开下逐阶一致；Ising模型总磁化强度的概率分布可在Model A框架下恢复。
AI.conclusion: 超对称性需要额外条件才能保证时间反演不变性，但时间反演不变性在宏观尺度上仍有效；Model A动力学与平衡统计力学的联系比此前理解的更为深刻。

title: A helical Rashba--exchange gauge field drives a uniaxial pair density wave in EuRbFe$_4$As$_4$
summary: The recent discovery of an intrinsic pair density wave (PDW) in the iron-pnictide superconductor EuRbFe$_4$As$_4$ presents a fascinating puzzle. Structurally, the FeAs layers break local inversion symmetry, while the Eu$^{2+}$ spins exhibit a period-four helical magnetic order. Here, we demonstrate that the interplay of induced Rashba spin-orbit coupling and the helical exchange field generates a layer-rotating effective $U(1)$ gauge field for the Cooper pairs. Because this gauge field shares the symmetry of the Fe $3d_{xz}/3d_{yz}$ orbitals, it explicitly induces an intertwined, orbital-selective pairing state. Using a phenomenological Ginzburg-Landau theory, we show this mechanism naturally stabilizes a structurally modulated Bloch superconducting state. This state features a strictly uniaxial (unidirectional) PDW, naturally capturing the phenomenology of recent scanning tunneling microscopy experiments. Furthermore, we predict this PDW is accompanied by spontaneous loop currents between adjacent layers, offering a distinctive signature for future $μ$SR or scanning SQUID experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在铁基超导体EuRbFe$_4$As$_4$中，由Rashba自旋轨道耦合与螺旋交换场的相互作用产生了一个层旋转的U(1)规范场，该规范场诱导了轨道选择性的配对态，从而自然形成了一种单向的Bloch超导态（即配对密度波），并伴随有层间自发环流。
AI.motivation: 解释在EuRbFe$_4$As$_4$中观察到的本征配对密度波（PDW）的微观起源，这是一个令人困惑的新发现。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，结合Rashba自旋轨道耦合与螺旋交换场的相互作用，构造了层旋转的U(1)规范场，并使用唯象的Ginzburg-Landau理论进行验证。
AI.result: 该机制自然产生了一种严格单向的Bloch超导态（PDW），解释了STM实验现象，并预测了伴随的层间自发环流。
AI.conclusion: 该PDW是由轨道选择性的配对机制驱动的，伴随的层间环流可作为未来μSR或扫描SQUID实验的验证特征。

title: Signature of spin liquid state in a frustrated 3D antiferromagnet
summary: Frustrated pyrochlore lattices in transition-metal oxides provide an ideal platform for realizing exotic quantum states, including spin liquids with unconventional low-energy excitations arising from the macroscopic ground-state degeneracy of corner-sharing tetrahedral networks. Here, we report the synthesis and comprehensive characterization of ZnCrGaO$4$, a frustrated three-dimensional pyrochlore-like magnet in which intrinsic cation ordering gives rise to unavoidable atomic-site disorder. A Curie--Weiss analysis of the high-temperature magnetic susceptibility yields a large negative Curie--Weiss temperature, $θ{\mathrm{CW}} \approx -205$ K, indicating dominant antiferromagnetic exchange interactions ($J/k_{\mathrm{B}} \sim 55$ K) between Cr$^{3+}$ ($S = 3/2$) moments. Despite the presence of strong antiferromagnetic interactions, no signature of long-range magnetic ordering is observed down to 125 mK, as evidenced by specific-heat and ac-susceptibility measurements. Furthermore, the absence of bifurcation between zero-field-cooled and field-cooled dc magnetic susceptibilities measured at 0.01 T indicates the absence of spin freezing, which is further supported by the frequency-independent ac susceptibility down to 250 mK. The presence of broad maxima in the magnetic specific heat and ac susceptibility at low temperatures suggests the development of short-range spin correlations within a dynamic magnetic state. In addition, the low-temperature specific heat follows a power-law behavior below 1 K, indicating the presence of unconventional low-energy excitations and algebraic spin correlations. These results provide compelling evidence for a dynamic correlated ground state in ZnCrGaO$_4$, establishing it as a promising platform for exploring highly frustrated $S > 1/2$ three-dimensional quantum magnets and potential spin-liquid behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了ZnCrGaO4的合成与表征，这是一种存在固有阳离子无序的受挫烧绿石样磁性材料。尽管存在强反铁磁相互作用（θ_CW ≈ -205 K），该材料在125 mK以下未观察到长程磁有序或自旋冻结，低温比热呈现幂律行为，表明其具有动态关联基态和非常规低能激发，是研究S > 1/2三维量子自旋液体的理想平台。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属氧化物中的受挫烧绿石晶格是实现奇异量子态（如自旋液体）的理想平台，但高自旋（S > 1/2）三维量子磁体中是否存在自旋液体行为仍是一个重要问题。本研究旨在合成ZnCrGaO4并探究其在强受挫条件下的基态性质。
AI.method: 合成ZnCrGaO4多晶样品，利用磁化率、比热、交流磁化率等多种手段进行表征。通过Curie-Weiss分析估算交换相互作用强度，并在极低温（低至125 mK）下系统测量磁学和热力学性质。
AI.result: （1）Curie-Weiss温度θ_CW ≈ -205 K，表明强反铁磁相互作用；（2）低至125 mK未观察到长程磁有序；（3）零场冷和场冷直流磁化率在0.01 T下无分叉，交流磁化率频率无关，表明无自旋冻结；（4）低温比热在1 K以下呈现幂律行为，表明非常规低能激发和代数自旋关联。
AI.conclusion: ZnCrGaO4展现出一个动态关联的量子自旋液体基态，没有长程磁有序或自旋冻结，是具有强受挫的S > 1/2三维量子磁体，为研究高自旋三维量子自旋液体提供了有前景的平台。

title: Systematic comparison of approximations and functionals in first-principle calculations of aluminum-based III-V ferroelectric nitrides
summary: We revisit first-principles predictions of structural, ferroelectric, and electronic properties in aluminum-based III-V nitride alloys, focusing on Al1-xScxN and Al1-xBxN. Using density functional theory within a unified 48-atom supercell framework, we systematically assess the role of chemical disorder and exchange-correlation approximations by comparing the virtual crystal approximation (VCA) and special quasirandom structures (SQS), as well as PBE, PBESol, SCAN, and SCAN+rVV10 functionals. We demonstrate that, even amongst the similar PBE and PBESol functionals, big quantitative and qualitative differences emerge. In particular, the VCA or SQS PBESol (a popular functional) strongly underestimate the stability domain of the ferroelectric wurtzite phase in Al1-xScxN compared to SQS PBE or SQS SCAN. We demonstrate that the 5-fold coordinated hexagonal phase predicted in 2002 by Farrer and Bellaiche [Phys. Rev. B 66, 201203] is a low-energy metastable state between the four-fold coordinated ferroelectric wurtzite phase and the six-fold coordinated rocksalt phase near the transition point upon increasing the Sc content. In contrast, Al1-xBxN shows a much faster destabilization of the wurtzite ferroelectric phase, with bond breaking which strongly distorts the wurtzite structure (with enhanced polarization) and eventually favor a zincblende phase and a threefold coordinated hexagonal layer phase. Our analysis highlights the critical importance of both local disorder and exchange-correlation treatment in predicting the functional properties of III-V nitride ferroelectrics. Overall, SQS combined with SCAN provides the most consistent theoretical framework for understanding and optimizing emerging nitride-based ferroelectric materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统比较了不同交换关联泛函和化学无序处理方法对Al1-xScxN和Al1-xBxN结构、铁电和电子性质预测的影响，发现SQS结合SCAN泛函是描述III-V族氮化物铁电体最一致的理论框架。
AI.motivation: 铝基III-V族氮化物（Al1-xScxN和Al1-xBxN）是新兴的铁电材料，但其理论预测严重依赖于计算方法的选择（如VCA vs SQS、不同泛函），现有研究缺乏系统性的比较，导致预测结果存在较大不确定性，需要建立一个可靠的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用统一的48原子超胞框架，基于密度泛函理论，系统比较了虚拟晶体近似（VCA）和特殊准随机结构（SQS）两种化学无序处理方法，以及PBE、PBESol、SCAN、SCAN+rVV10四种交换关联泛函对Al1-xScxN和Al1-xBxN性质的预测差异。
AI.result: 1）即使PBE和PBESol这类相似泛函之间也存在显著的定量和定性差异；2）VCA或SQS PBESol严重低估Al1-xScxN中铁电纤锌矿相的稳定区间；3）发现Farrer和Bellaiche在2002年预测的五配位六方相是介于四配位铁电纤锌矿相和六配位岩盐相之间的低能亚稳态；4）Al1-xBxN中纤锌矿铁电相失稳更快，出现键断裂并最终形成闪锌矿相和三配位六方层状相。
AI.conclusion: 局部无序和交换关联处理对于预测III-V族氮化物铁电体的功能性质至关重要，SQS结合SCAN泛函是最为一致和可靠的理论框架。

title: Harnessing AtomisticSkills for Agentic Atomistic Research
summary: Computational materials science and chemistry span vast knowledge domains and fractured software ecosystems. Although large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated research capabilities, scaling monolithic agents to manage the rigor and complexity of atomistic research remains a challenge. Here, we introduce AtomisticSkills, an open-source harness framework that empowers general-purpose AI coding agents to conduct atomistic research across materials science, chemistry, and drug discovery. By hierarchically decomposing scientific workflows into agent skills and tools, AtomisticSkills provides agents with modular, extensible, and plug-and-play research capabilities. The framework integrates more than 100 human-curated multidisciplinary skills, including database access, thermodynamics and kinetics modeling, and diverse simulation engines employing machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) and density functional theory (DFT). We validate its functional coverage against scientific literature and demonstrate robust orchestration capabilities across diverse scientific campaigns: generative design of Li-ion solid-state electrolytes, high-throughput screening of metal-organic frameworks for CO2 capture, autonomous MLIP benchmarking and fine-tuning, multi-stage structure-based virtual screening for drug design, multimodal X-ray diffraction pattern analysis, and screening of Fe-oxide catalysts for oxygen evolution reaction. AtomisticSkills provides a critical agent infrastructure towards building fully autonomous AI scientists.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AtomisticSkills，一个开源框架，通过将科学工作流层次分解为模块化技能和工具，使通用AI编码代理能够自主执行材料科学、化学和药物发现领域的原子尺度研究任务，集成了100+人工策划的多学科技能，并在多个科学任务中验证了其能力。
AI.motivation: 计算材料科学与化学领域知识体系庞大、软件生态碎片化，现有LLM代理难以处理原子尺度研究的严谨性和复杂性，缺乏统一的模块化框架来整合多学科工具和工作流。
AI.method: 提出AtomisticSkills框架，通过层次化分解将科学工作流拆分为代理技能和工具，实现模块化、可扩展、即插即用的研究能力。集成100+人工策划的多学科技能，涵盖数据库访问、热力学/动力学建模、基于MLIP和DFT的多种仿真引擎。
AI.result: 在六个科学任务上验证了框架能力：锂离子固态电解质生成设计、MOF高CO2捕获通量筛选、自主MLIP基准测试与微调、多阶段基于结构的药物虚拟筛选、多模态XRD图谱分析、铁氧化物OER催化剂筛选。
AI.conclusion: AtomisticSkills为构建全自主AI科学家提供了关键的代理基础设施，展示了模块化架构在处理复杂原子尺度研究任务中的有效性和可扩展性。

title: Controlling spin-$\frac 12$ antiferromagnetic interaction strength in nanographene dimers
summary: We demonstrate that the effective spin-exchange coupling $J$ in open-shell nanographene dimers can be precisely tuned via tip-induced dehydrogenation of selected carbon atoms. Using the double ionization potential equation-of-motion coupled-cluster singles and doubles (DIP-EOM-CCSD) method, we accurately compute the singlet-triplet gaps, which correspond directly to the exchange coupling $J$. We show that the position of the dehydrogenated (or hydrogen-passivated) site in triangulene dimers strongly modulates the singlet-triplet splitting, allowing $J$ to be tuned over a wide range - from a few meV to several tens of meV. This strategy provides a simple yet powerful route for designing tailored spin models with alternating or spatially patterned spin-exchange couplings.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过尖端诱导脱氢精确调控开壳纳米石墨烯二聚体中自旋交换耦合J的方法，并利用DIP-EOM-CCSD方法计算单重态-三重态能隙，实现了J值从几meV到几十meV的宽范围调控。
AI.motivation: 实现在纳米石墨烯二聚体中对自旋交换耦合J的精确调控，为设计具有交替或空间图案化自旋交换耦合的自旋模型提供简单而有效的途径。
AI.method: 通过尖端诱导脱氢/氢钝化选定碳原子来调控耦合；采用DIP-EOM-CCSD方法精确计算单重态-三重态能隙以获取J值。
AI.result: 脱氢位点在三角烯二聚体中的位置强烈调制单重态-三重态分裂，使J可在数meV到数十meV的宽范围内被调控。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为设计具有定制化自旋交换耦合的复杂自旋模型提供了一条简单而有效的途径。

title: The Method of Simultaneous Solutions Applied to Neutron Transport and Heat Conduction
summary: This paper provides an initial description of the Method of Simultaneous Solutions, a Monte Carlo approach that simultaneously solves multiple Boltzmann-transport-like phenomena. Here, it is used to simultaneously solve the neutron transport and heat conduction equations. Analytically-derived weighting factors are tracked through a neutron transport-governed random walk to tally statistical estimators that can be used to calculate the temperature distribution. In this initial presentation, the method is readily applicable to neutron-heat multiphysics problems where the heat source and neutron source are identically distributed spatially. The primary theoretical benefit of MOSS lies in the reduction of computational cost that occurs from the removal of a dedicated routine to solve the heat conduction equation. Practically, branching processes required to capture the disparate boundary conditions associated with these separate physical phenomena can lead to large computational times dedicated to a single physics. In addition, this correlated sampling-based method can suffer from infinite variance associated with statistical estimators if the stochastic processes being tracked are too different. The final drawback demonstrated in this paper is that the approximation of heat conduction as a Boltzmann transport-governed process leads to errors in calculated temperatures. The paper explores these drawbacks on two demonstration problems, a problem consisting of slab geometry and a problem consisting of a hexagonal pin cell.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为“同时求解法”(MOSS)的蒙特卡洛方法，可同时求解中子输运和热传导等多物理场问题，通过中子随机游走中追踪解析权重因子来统计温度分布，但存在分支过程计算成本高、无限方差风险及热传导近似误差等局限。
AI.motivation: 传统中子-热多物理场耦合问题需要分别求解中子输运方程和热传导方程，计算成本高昂。本文旨在通过一种统一的蒙特卡洛框架同时求解多个玻尔兹曼输运类方程，从而消除专门求解热传导方程的独立计算模块，降低计算开销。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛方法，通过中子输运主导的随机游走过程，追踪解析推导的权重因子，统计可用于计算温度分布的统计估计量。该方法将热传导近似为玻尔兹曼输运过程，并与中子输运在同一随机游走框架中同时求解。
AI.result: 以平板几何和六边形栅元两个演示问题验证了方法，但揭示了三个主要缺点：(1) 处理不同物理现象边界条件的分支过程导致单物理计算时间大幅增加；(2) 当追踪的随机过程差异过大时，相关采样方法存在统计估计量无限方差的风险；(3) 将热传导近似为玻尔兹曼输运过程导致温度计算误差。
AI.conclusion: MOSS方法在热源与中子源空间分布一致的中子-热多物理问题中具有理论上的计算成本优势，但实际应用中面临分支过程计算膨胀、无限方差和近似误差等挑战，需要进一步改进。

title: Universal classification of continuous phase transitions with two order parameters
summary: The continuous phase transition, indicated by the macroscopic order parameter and the occurrence of the spontaneous symmetry breaking, is well illustrated based on the Ginzburg-Landau's paradigm. In systems described by one order parameter, the phase diagram is only composed of the normal phase and the ordered phase. However, in systems with two or more order parameters, much richer phase diagrams and critical phenomena may emerge. According to coupling terms of the free energy, we classify the systems with two order parameters into several categories, featuring different patterns of phase diagrams and critical scalings respectively. Our work propose the new avenue to studying and evaluating the complex systems only based on the coupling terms in expressions of free energy.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Ginzburg-Landau范式，研究具有两个序参量的系统中的连续相变，根据自由能耦合项对系统分类，揭示了更丰富的相图和临界标度行为。
AI.motivation: 传统的Ginzburg-Landau范式主要描述了单序参量系统的相变（仅包含正常相和有序相），而现实中的复杂系统往往涉及多个序参量，可能展现出更丰富的相图和临界现象。作者希望通过研究双序参量系统的自由能耦合项，建立一种新的分类框架来理解和评估复杂系统。
AI.method: 基于自由能表达式中不同序参量之间的耦合项形式，将双序参量系统划分为若干类别，分别分析各类别对应的相图特征和临界标度行为。
AI.result: 揭示了不同耦合项类别下相图的多样化模式，以及相应的临界标度规律差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种仅基于自由能耦合项来研究和评估复杂系统的新途径。

title: Emergence of Triplet Superconductivity from Cavity Vacuum Fluctuations
summary: Engineering quantum materials with cavity fields has emerged as a powerful route to manipulate phases of quantum matter in solids. Here we demonstrate that cavity vacuum fluctuations alone can drive the emergence of triplet superconductivity in an otherwise singlet superconductor. The vacuum field renormalizes the electronic band structure in a polarization dependent manner, reshaping the Fermi surface and altering the competition among symmetry allowed pairing channels. As a result, multiple superconducting phases arise from the cavity vacuum fluctuations. Above a critical light matter coupling, the leading instability switches from singlet to triplet pairing, yielding a superconducting state absent in the bare material. This vacuum induced symmetry transition produces distinct modifications of the gap structure and low energy quasiparticle spectrum. Our results establish cavity vacuum engineering as a mechanism for generating unconventional superconducting phases and stabilizing triplet states of potential relevance for topological superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，腔真空涨落可以诱导原本的singlet超导体出现triplet超导配对。通过真空场重整化电子能带结构，改变费米面形状和配对通道竞争，在超过临界光-物质耦合强度后，主导不稳定性从singlet转为triplet配对，实现了裸材料中不存在的超导态。
AI.motivation: 探索利用腔真空场（而非外加驱动场）来操控量子材料的超导相位，特别是诱导非常规的triplet超导配对。
AI.method: 通过真空涨落重整化电子能带结构，改变费米面形貌和对称性允许的配对通道竞争，理论分析光-物质耦合的极化依赖效应。
AI.result: 超过临界耦合强度后，超导主导不稳定性从singlet转变为triplet；真空诱导的对称性转变改变了能隙结构和低能准粒子谱。
AI.conclusion: 腔真空工程可作为产生非常规超导相和稳定triplet态（对拓扑超导有潜在意义）的新机制。

title: Charge density wave in a band insulator
summary: Charge density wave (CDW) implies a periodic modulation of the charge density. Typically observed in metallic systems, CDWs arise from Fermi surface instabilities, resulting in the total or partial gapping of the Fermi surface. Here, we present experimental evidence for a CDW state emerging in a band insulator which has no Fermi surface. The bulk and surface of our material platform, Bi4Br4, is gapped over the entire Brillouin zone. Through topographic and spectroscopic imaging at low temperatures, we unveil an unexpected unidirectional charge modulation in Bi4Br4, breaking the lattice translation symmetry. The CDW develops at temperatures below 40 K and adds an energy gap atop the existing insulating gap of Bi4Br4. Furthermore, our transport measurements reveal nonlinear electrical conduction, a phenomenon conventionally associated with the sliding or phason mode of incommensurate CDWs. These highly unusual observations represent a new type of CDW and demand a new theoretical framework for CDWs.

AI.tldr: 本文在能带绝缘体Bi4Br4中发现了电荷密度波（CDW）态，其特征是在无费米面的体系中出现了单向电荷调制、额外能隙打开以及非线性电导，挑战了传统CDW理论框架。
AI.motivation: 传统CDW被认为起源于金属体系的费米面不稳定性，而作者试图探索在完全没有费米面的能带绝缘体中是否也能存在CDW态，以拓展对CDW物理机制的理解。
AI.method: 通过低温扫描隧道显微镜（STM）进行形貌和谱学成像，观测电荷调制；结合输运测量表征电导非线性行为，系统研究Bi4Br4的电子性质。
AI.result: 在Bi4Br4中观测到温度低于40 K时出现的单向电荷调制，破坏了晶格平移对称性；该CDW态在原有绝缘能隙之上额外打开了一个能隙；输运测量显示非线性电导行为，类似于非公度CDW的滑动或声子模式。
AI.conclusion: 在无费米面的能带绝缘体中发现CDW态属于高度反常的现象，代表了一种新型CDW，需要建立新的理论框架来解释其起源。

title: Dilute Magnetism and Edge-State Engineering in Monolayer SnO
summary:
Tin monoxide (SnO) is a p-type oxide semiconductor whose electronic properties can be widely modified via atomic-scale engineering. Using density functional theory, we investigate the electronic and magnetic properties of transition-metal (TM = Mn, Fe, Co and W) doped SnO monolayer within a large supercell. We find that all dopants induce finite localized magnetic moments, primarily originating from $d$-orbitals of the impurity atoms. We show that these localized magnetic states give rise to nearly
  dispersionless bands in the vicinity of the Fermi energy (taking Co doped SnO as an example). In addition, we investigate dimensional effects by constructing nanoribbon geometries of SnO monolayer. The ribbons exhibit intrinsic edge-localized states that are largely independent of ribbon width. For chiral nanoribbons oriented along a low-symmetry direction of the square lattice, we find that oxygen-rich edges are thermodynamically most stable and remain semiconducting, whereas Sn-terminated edges host metallic one-dimensional conduction channels. Our results demonstrate that transition-metal doping and edge engineering provide effective routes to tailor the electronic properties of SnO monolayer, making it a promising candidate for future spintronic and nanoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度泛函理论计算，系统研究了过渡金属（Mn、Fe、Co、W）掺杂SnO单层的电子和磁学性质，以及纳米带边缘效应对其电子结构的调控作用。研究发现掺杂诱导局域磁矩并产生近费米能级的色散平带，而边缘工程可产生金属性一维导电通道或保持半导体特性，为自旋电子学和纳米电子学应用提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: SnO是一种p型氧化物半导体，其电子性质可通过原子尺度工程广泛调控。为了探索其在自旋电子学和纳米电子学中的应用潜力，需要深入理解过渡金属掺杂和边缘工程对其电子和磁学性质的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）方法，在大超胞中计算过渡金属（Mn、Fe、Co、W）掺杂SnO单层的电子和磁学性质；进一步构建纳米带结构研究维度效应和边缘态特征。
AI.result: （1）所有掺杂原子均诱导出局域磁矩，主要来源于杂质原子的d轨道；（2）以Co掺杂为例，局域磁态在费米能级附近产生近乎无色散的平带；（3）纳米带存在与宽度无关的本征边缘局域态；（4）沿低对称方向的手性纳米带中，富氧边缘热力学最稳定且保持半导体性，而Sn终止边缘支持金属性一维导电通道。
AI.conclusion: 过渡金属掺杂和边缘工程是调控SnO单层电子性质的有效途径，使其成为未来自旋电子学和纳米电子学应用的有前途候选材料。

title: UniField: RBF-Guided Electron Density Fusion for Enhanced Molecular Representations
summary: Current 3D geometric molecular representations predominantly focus on discrete atomic skeletons, inherently overlooking the continuous electron density (ED) field that fundamentally governs microscopic quantum behaviors. Consequently, these purely topological models suffer from critical representational blind spots, particularly in capturing long-range electron delocalization and non-covalent interactions, imposing a severe theoretical ceiling on predicting complex quantum properties. To bridge this physical gap and standardize research in electron density-enhanced molecular learning, we first construct the large-scale UniField-ED Benchmark. Comprising the QM9-ED and QMugs-ED datasets, this benchmark provides natively aligned discrete graphs and high-fidelity ED point clouds. Building upon this data infrastructure, we introduce UniField, an SE(3)-equivariant multimodal architecture that intrinsically intertwines discrete topological graphs with continuous quantum electronic environments. Extensive empirical evaluations across all three benchmarks demonstrate that UniField establishes new state-of-the-art performance. Specifically, UniField achieves a 14.8% improvement in overall predictive performance against the leading topology-only SOTA on the ED5-OE benchmark, alongside a 37.0% performance gain over top pure-ED models. Furthermore, on the complex drug-like dataset QMugs-ED, it yields a striking 28.2% average precision improvement across frontier orbital properties. Alongside new SOTA results on QM9-ED, our method establishes a rigorous foundation for next-generation computational chemistry. Code and datasets are anonymously available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UniField-ED-5B1B.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniField-ED基准和UniField模型，通过融合离散分子图与连续电子密度场，在量子性质预测上取得了显著提升（14.8%-37.0%），为计算化学建立了新基准。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分子表示仅关注离散原子骨架，忽略了连续电子密度场（ED），导致无法捕捉长程电子离域和非共价相互作用，严重限制了复杂量子性质的预测能力。
AI.method: 构建大规模UniField-ED基准（含QM9-ED和QMugs-ED），提供对齐的离散图与高保真ED点云；提出UniField，一种SE(3)-等变多模态架构，将离散拓扑图与连续量子电子环境内在交织融合。
AI.result: 在ED5-OE基准上，相比纯拓扑SOTA提升14.8%，相比纯ED模型提升37.0%；在QMugs-ED上，前沿轨道性质平均精度提升28.2%；在QM9-ED上同样取得新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: UniField通过融合离散拓扑与连续电子密度场，突破了纯拓扑模型的理论天花板，为下一代计算化学建立了严谨基础。

title: Electrostatically stabilized surface flat bands in rhombohedral graphite at zero displacement field
summary: Rhombohedral (ABC-stacked) multilayer graphene hosts interaction-driven phases enabled by surface flat bands at large displacement fields. In thick flakes, however, strong screening suppresses internal electric fields, raising the question of whether a flat-band regime is accessible within the same experimental paradigm. Here, we show that self-consistent, nonlinear electrostatics provides a robust alternative mechanism: even in the absence of a displacement field, a nonuniform near-surface potential flattens the surface-band dispersion and enhances the density of states. In the strong-coupling limit, electrostatics drives the system toward uniform half-filling at each momentum, yielding an asymptotically flat surface band without any gating. At realistic interaction strengths, surface-band flatness is tuned by the proximal gate, with maximal flatness achieved at hole doping when the band is empty. Combining analytic arguments with fully self-consistent calculations in a realistic model, we map the resulting low-field regime and connect to finite $N\!\sim\! 6-15$ layered samples, providing a framework for analyzing the symmetry-broken phases observed in these systems. Our results motivate future experiments in large-$N$ devices and establish a low-field regime for exploring electrostatically induced flat-band physics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了菱面体多层石墨烯中，即使在没有外加位移场的情况下，通过自洽非线性静电学机制也能实现表面能带变平，从而产生强关联物理。通过理论分析和自洽计算，作者建立了低位移场区域的分析框架，并连接至有限层数（~6-15层）样品，为理解其中对称性破缺相提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 厚层菱面体石墨烯中强屏蔽效应抑制了内部电场，使得传统依赖大位移场实现平带的实验范式受到挑战，因此需要探索是否存在其他机制使平带区域仍可访问。
AI.method: 结合解析论证和全自洽计算，在现实模型中分析非线性静电学对表面能带色散的调控作用，并映射低位移场区域。
AI.result: 在无位移场时，非均匀近表面势可通过非线性静电学使表面能带变平、态密度增强；在强耦合极限下，系统趋向于每个动量均匀半填充，无需栅压即可实现渐近平带。在现实相互作用强度下，平带度可通过邻近栅极调控，空穴掺杂时平带度最大。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了大层数石墨烯器件中静电诱导平带物理的低场研究框架，为实验探索对称性破缺相提供了新路径，并激励未来在大N器件中开展实验。

title: Machine-learned atomistic simulations reveal the basis of hydrogen-induced crack-plane transition in alpha-Fe
summary: Hydrogen-related fracture in body-centered cubic Fe and ferritic steels often appears as transgranular quasi-cleavage rather than purely intergranular failure, especially at low to moderate hydrogen contents. Fractography has suggested that hydrogen may change the dominant cleavage faceting from {100} toward {110}, but atomic-scale evidence for this possible crack-plane transition remains unclear. Here we construct an efficient neural-network potential for α-Fe/H and combine large-scale, three-dimensional molecular dynamics with grand-canonical Monte Carlo (GCMC), allowing the near-tip crack-surface region and crack tip within a defined GCMC domain to exchange hydrogen with a reservoir at fixed chemical potential. A comparison of four crack systems identifies the controlling response: (100)[010], (100)[011], and (110)[001] remain cleavage-dominated, whereas the (110)[1-10] crack changes from dislocation emission in pure Fe to cleavage under hydrogen charging. The energetic origin is twofold. Hydrogen lowers the Griffith cleavage threshold of the {110} cleavage-plane family more strongly than that of {100}, and, for the controlling crack, a Rice-type energetic descriptor indicates that the surface-energy-controlled cleavage resistance decreases faster than the unstable-stacking-fault-controlled emission resistance, consistent with a weakened dislocation-emission shield. These results provide a thermodynamically consistent atomistic basis for a hydrogen-induced transgranular crack-plane transition in Fe.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建α-Fe/H神经网络势，结合分子动力学与巨正则蒙特卡洛模拟，从原子尺度揭示了氢致体心立方铁中穿晶解理面从{100}向{110}转变的机制，发现氢对{110}面Griffith解理阈值的降低更强，且(110)[1-10]裂纹系统在充氢后由位错发射转变为解理断裂。
AI.motivation: 实验断口分析表明氢可能改变铁中主导解理面从{100}向{110}转变，但缺乏原子尺度的直接证据，亟需从微观机制上阐明这一裂纹面转变的物理本质。
AI.method: 构建了α-Fe/H体系的高效神经网络势，采用三维大规模分子动力学结合巨正则蒙特卡洛方法，使裂纹尖端区域与固定化学势的氢储库进行交换，比较了四种裂纹系统的断裂响应。
AI.result: (100)[010]、(100)[011]和(110)[001]裂纹保持解理主导，(110)[1-10]裂纹从纯Fe的位错发射转变为充氢后的解理断裂。氢对{110}面Griffith阈值的降低强于{100}面，且Rice能量描述符表明解理阻力下降速度快于位错发射阻力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了氢致铁中穿晶裂纹面转变的热力学一致的原子尺度基础，揭示了氢削弱位错发射屏蔽效应导致解理优先发生的微观机制。

title: Theory of supercooled water
summary: We introduce a model of water contemplating true supercooled-liquid states that, as such, are metastable with respect to the crystalline-solid ones. Its numerical solutions reproduce from Speedy-Angell's stability-limit picture to Poole et al.'s metastable liquid--liquid criticality. The real existence of a liquid--liquid critical point is found to gain significant theoretical plausibility from a hitherto unnoticed analogy with the ``inversion thermodynamics'' of Joule-Thomson gas throttling process and, by extension, with the equivalent phenomenology exhibited by black holes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个过冷水模型，数值解复现了从Speedy-Angell稳定极限图到Poole等人的亚稳态液-液临界性，并通过与焦耳-汤姆逊节流过程及黑洞的类比，增强了液-液临界点真实存在的理论可信度。
AI.motivation: 探究过冷水真实亚稳态液态的性质，特别是液-液临界点是否存在这一争议性问题。
AI.method: 构建描述过冷水亚稳态的数学模型，进行数值求解，并引入与焦耳-汤姆逊节流过程和黑洞热力学的类比分析。
AI.result: 模型数值解成功再现了Speedy-Angell稳定极限图和Poole等人的液-液临界性；发现了与焦耳-汤姆逊节流及黑洞"反转热力学"的类比。
AI.conclusion: 液-液临界点的真实存在获得了来自热力学类比的新理论支持，提升了其物理可信度。

title: Synchronization of Bloch Oscillations in array of parallel Josephson Junctions
summary: We demonstrate the synchronization of current quantization in a parallel array of weakly coupled Josephson Junctions operating in the regime of the coherent quantum phase slip. The first quantized current step on the voltage-current characteristic of 69 parallel Josephson junctions, under microwave excitation at a frequency of f = 19.325 GHz, is observed at 426 nA. Experiments show that accuracy of quantization does not degrade with increasing number of combined Josephson junctions. This demonstration addresses the issue of quantized current amplitude requirements adopted for a practical quantum standard, while leaving the question of accuracy for further research. At present, the quantum current standard of accepted metrological accuracy in the triangle of electrical units is under development. The other two, the Volt and Ohm standards based on the Josephson and Quantum Hall effects, respectively, are already well established in metrology.

AI.tldr: 本文在69个弱耦合约瑟夫森结的并联阵列中，在相干量子相位滑移机制下，成功实现了电流量子化的同步，并在19.325 GHz微波激励下观察到426 nA的首次量子化电流台阶，验证了并联结数量增加不会降低量子化精度，为实用化量子电流标准提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 开发基于量子效应的电流标准，补齐电学单位“三角”（量子电压、量子电阻、量子电流）中缺失的一环，解决实际量子电流标准对量化电流幅值的要求问题。
AI.method: 采用69个弱耦合约瑟夫森结并联阵列，在相干量子相位滑移（CQPS）机制下工作，施加19.325 GHz微波激励，测量电压-电流特性曲线中的量子化电流台阶。
AI.result: 在19.325 GHz微波激励下，观察到第一个量子化电流台阶位于426 nA；实验表明并联结数量增加（69个结）不会导致量子化精度下降。
AI.conclusion: 证明了弱耦合约瑟夫森结阵列可以实现电流量子化的同步，且精度不随结数量增加而退化，为实用化量子电流标准奠定了基础，但精度问题仍需进一步研究。

title: 1/9 Magnetization Plateau in a Classical Kagome Ising Ferromagnet with Competing Further-Neighbor Interactions
summary: The two-dimensional kagome lattice is a paradigmatic platform for exploring geometrically frustrated magnetism. While the nearest-neighbor ferromagnetic Ising model on this lattice is theoretically trivial, competing further-neighbor interactions can reintroduce severe frustration. In this work, we systematically investigate a classical kagome Ising model with ferromagnetic nearest-neighbor (J1) and antiferromagnetic second- (J2) and third-neighbor (J3) couplings using simulated annealing Monte Carlo methods. We demonstrate that while J2 couplings merely suppress the conventional ferromagnetic order, the inclusion of J3 fundamentally reconstructs the low-temperature phase diagram. This extended geometric frustration stabilizes a novel ordered phase characterized by a robust 1/9 magnetization plateau and a massively enlarged 3 by 3 magnetic supercell. Crucially, this fractional ordered phase manifests as a stability plateau in the phase diagram, where its critical temperature becomes nearly independent of the coupling strength J3. We also calculate the corresponding static spin structure factor, revealing a distinct Z6-symmetric reciprocal-space signature for experimental identification. Our findings reveal that complex fractional magnetic orders can emerge purely from classical geometric frustration induced by competing extended interactions, providing a distinct mechanism for understanding fractionally ordered states in real frustrated magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟退火蒙特卡洛方法，系统研究了具有铁磁最近邻(J1)和反铁磁次近邻(J2, J3)耦合的经典kagome Ising模型，发现J3耦合引入的扩展几何阻挫能稳定一种具有1/9磁化平台和3×3超胞的新型分数有序相，且该相的临界温度对J3耦合强度几乎不敏感，并给出了可用于实验鉴别的Z6对称倒空间特征。
AI.motivation: 探索kagome晶格中由扩展相互作用（J3）诱发的几何阻挫如何产生非平凡的分数磁有序相，突破以往认为该模型仅含最近邻铁磁作用时是平凡的认知局限。
AI.method: 使用模拟退火蒙特卡洛方法，系统扫描J1-J2-J3耦合参数空间，计算磁化、比热、自旋结构因子等物理量，构建低温相图。
AI.result: 发现了J3耦合稳定的一种新型有序相，具有1/9磁化平台和3×3磁超胞；该相的临界温度随J3变化时呈现近乎恒定的稳定性平台；自旋结构因子呈现Z6对称的倒易空间特征。
AI.conclusion: 纯经典几何阻挫（由竞争的扩展相互作用引起）即可产生复杂的分数磁有序态，为理解实际阻挫磁体中的分数有序态提供了新的机制。

title: Light-Driven Ferroic Switching Enables Reversible Control of Hydrogen Adsorption Thermodynamics
summary: Reversible ultrafast switching of surface thermodynamics is highly desirable for hydrogen storage and catalysis yet remains elusive at the nanoscale. Here we demonstrate that photoinduced ferroic-order switching in two-dimensional ionic ferroelectric monolayers enables rapid, reversible control of hydrogen binding. In TiGeSe$_3$, carrier-density-driven redistribution of transition-metal 3\textit{d} orbital occupations triggers a sequential evolution from the ferroelectric ground state to paraelectric phases with staggered or Zig-Zag antiferromagnetic order. This switch continuously tunes the hydrogen adsorption free energy from 0.33 to 1.11 eV, shifting the interface from near-thermoneutrality to spontaneous desorption. Nonadiabatic dynamics indicate that electron-phonon coupling promotes nonthermal H release, while picosecond carrier recombination rapidly restores the initial ferroic order, closing an ultrafast reversible cycle. Generality is further validated in AgBiP$_2$Se$_6$ and CuInP$_2$S$_6$, establishing ferroic order as an optically addressable knob for dynamic thermodynamic reconfiguration beyond static design.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在二维离子铁电单层TiGeSe₃中，通过光致铁电序切换实现氢吸附自由能的可逆超快调控（0.33-1.11 eV），并验证了该机制在AgBiP₂Se₆和CuInP₂S₆中的普适性，为动态热力学重构提供了光学可寻址方案。
AI.motivation: 表面热力学的可逆超快开关在储氢和催化领域极具价值，但在纳米尺度上一直难以实现。现有静态设计方法无法满足动态调控需求，因此亟需一种可通过外部刺激快速、可逆地调节表面反应活性的新机制。
AI.method: 利用光致铁电序切换：在TiGeSe₃单层中，光生载流子密度驱动过渡金属3d轨道占据态重新分布，触发铁电基态到顺电相（交错或Zig-Zag反铁磁序）的序演化，从而连续调控氢吸附自由能。通过非绝热动力学研究电子-声子耦合促进的非热氢释放及皮秒级载流子复合恢复初始铁电序，实现超快可逆循环。
AI.result: 氢吸附自由能从0.33 eV（近热中性）连续调谐至1.11 eV（自发脱附）；电子-声子耦合驱动非热氢释放；皮秒级载流子复合快速恢复铁电序，完成超快可逆循环；在AgBiP₂Se₆和CuInP₂S₆中验证了该机制的普适性。
AI.conclusion: 铁电序可作为光学可寻址的调控旋钮，实现对表面热力学的动态可逆重构，超越了传统的静态设计范式，为智能催化、动态储氢等应用提供了新的物理机制和材料平台。

title: Multitask learning with semiempirical orbital charges enables sample-efficient MLIPs
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) require generating computationally expensive, large-scale training datasets to accurately simulate materials and molecules. Incorporating electronic structure information using multitask learning improves sample efficiency, however, training on full Hamiltonian matrices, which scale quadratically with the number of atoms, is intractable for large datasets. In this work, we show that multitask learning utilizing orbitally resolved semiempirical charges significantly improves sample efficiency and accuracy in MLIPs. To efficiently predict orbital charges, we implement a specialized equivariant model, reducing charge prediction error compared to an invariant baseline. By augmenting training with computationally inexpensive GFN1-xTB orbital charges, which scale linearly with the number of atoms, our model achieves a 46\% reduction in energy mean absolute error and requires five times less data to match the performance of energy-only models. Furthermore, our approach outperforms models trained on expensive density functional theory (DFT) atomic charges, capturing orbitally resolved electronic complexity and forcing the network to learn a physically accurate latent space that spontaneously clusters metals by shared chemical properties. Because orbital charges are only required during training, this approach preserves inference efficiency, providing a scalable recipe for developing accurate, data-efficient foundation models for complex chemical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用轨道分辨的半经验电荷进行多任务学习，显著提升机器学习原子间势的样本效率和精度，实现46%的能量MAE降低，并只需五分之一的数据即可达到仅能量模型的性能。
AI.motivation: MLIPs需要大量昂贵的训练数据；多任务学习可提升样本效率，但全哈密顿矩阵训练在大数据集上不可行。
AI.method: 使用GFN1-xTB轨道电荷（线性扩展）增强训练，结合专用等变模型预测轨道电荷，多任务学习框架。
AI.result: 能量MAE降低46%；五倍数据效率提升；优于DFT原子电荷模型；潜在空间自发聚类金属化学性质。
AI.conclusion: 轨道电荷多任务学习是一种可扩展、高效的MLIP训练策略，训练后推理效率不变，适合构建复杂化学系统的基础模型。

title: Quantized thermal current vortices
summary: The thermal Hall effect has emerged as a fundamental tool for probing exotic quasiparticles and topological order, particularly in magnetic insulators where electronic conduction is suppressed. Much like skyrmions, which are characterized by their topologically protected spin configurations, the thermal Hall effect is deeply rooted in the geometric properties of the underlying physical space. Although the effect is a well-established experimental phenomenon, current research points toward the existence of its quantum analogue: the quantized thermal Hall effect. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework for this quantum version based on Sommerfeld's flux quantization. Furthermore, we demonstrate the potential existence of dissipationless thermal current vortices. We suggest that these vortices may play a crucial role in the stability and dynamics of other topological structures, such as skyrmion lattices, offering a new perspective on the interplay between heat transport and magnetic textures.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Sommerfeld通量量子化，为量子化热霍尔效应提供了理论框架，并展示了无耗散热流涡旋的潜在存在，揭示了热输运与磁织构之间的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 热霍尔效应是探测奇异准粒子和拓扑序的重要工具，现有研究指向其量子化版本的存在，但目前缺乏统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 基于Sommerfeld通量量子化，构建量子化热霍尔效应的理论框架。
AI.result: 建立了量子化热霍尔效应的理论框架，展示了无耗散热流涡旋的潜在存在性。
AI.conclusion: 这些热流涡旋可能在斯格明子晶格等拓扑结构的稳定性和动力学中发挥关键作用，为理解热输运与磁织构之间的相互作用提供了新视角。

title: Linac: linear algebra with CUDA over finite fields
comment: 29 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code available at https://github.com/GDeLaurentis/linac
summary: Solving linear systems of polynomial equations is a ubiquitous problem in both mathematics and physics. The standard approach, Gaussian elimination, scales cubically with system size and often constitutes a computational bottleneck. The algorithm's inherent parallelism makes it well-suited for modern computing architectures, namely graphics processing units (GPUs), which offer significantly higher throughput than CPUs. Additionally, the use of finite fields -- integers modulo a prime -- in place of floating-point arithmetic offers a scalable solution to the issue of numerical precision loss, which becomes increasingly problematic at large system sizes. With Linac, we present a high-performance, open-source, parallel implementation of Gaussian elimination over finite fields and floating-point arithmetic. This tool has been developed for applications to analytic reconstruction of scattering amplitudes in quantum field theory.

AI.tldr: Linac 是一个高性能、开源的高斯消元并行实现，支持有限域和浮点运算，专为量子场论中散射振幅的解析重建而设计，利用GPU并行性解决线性多项式方程组求解的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 求解线性多项式方程组是数学和物理中的普遍问题，标准高斯消元法随系统规模呈立方增长，成为计算瓶颈；同时大系统下数值精度损失问题日益严重。
AI.method: 利用GPU的高并行性实现高斯消元法，并采用有限域（素数取模）代替浮点运算以解决数值精度问题，开发了开源高性能工具Linac，同时支持有限域和浮点两种算术类型。
AI.result: 实现了一个高性能、开源、支持有限域和浮点运算的高斯消元并行工具Linac。
AI.conclusion: Linac为量子场论中散射振幅的解析重建提供了高效的计算工具，充分利用了GPU并行架构和有限域数值稳定性优势。

title: Resonant interactions in the $α$-FPUT lattice with site-dependent coefficients
summary: The wave turbulence framework has proven to be an effective tool for analyzing certain features of nonlinear energy transfer in one-dimensional nonlinear chains. In this work, we extend this approach to the $α$-FPUT problem when the spring stiffness $χ$ and the nonlinear coefficient $α$ are site-dependent. Although three-wave interactions are non-resonant for constant coefficients, their spatial modulation gives rise to a non-trivial resonant manifold. In this framework, we derive a new kinetic equation that suggests the possibility of substantially faster thermalization with respect to the constant coefficient case. The new kinetic equation includes also an extra term that can be associated to the Bragg-scattering mechanism, which promotes the isotropization of the wave-action spectral density function.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展波湍流框架到α-FPUT问题（非均匀弹簧刚度χ和非线性系数α），发现空间调制使原本非共振的三波相互作用产生共振流形，推导出新的动力学方程，预示热化速度显著快于均匀系数情况，且新增Bragg散射项促进波作用谱密度各向同性化。
AI.motivation: 波湍流框架在均匀一维非线性链的能量传递分析中有效，但现实系统中参数往往具有空间依赖性，因此需要扩展此框架处理非均匀系数情况。
AI.method: 扩展波湍流框架到α-FPUT问题，考虑弹簧刚度χ和非线性系数α随位置变化；利用空间调制使原本非共振的三波相互作用产生共振流形，推导新的动力学方程。
AI.result: 新的动力学方程表明热化速度显著快于均匀系数情况；方程包含与Bragg散射机制相关的额外项，促进波作用谱密度函数的各向同性化。
AI.conclusion: 空间调制参数的非均匀性可显著加速能量热化过程，Bragg散射机制有助于谱密度各向同性化，拓展了波湍流理论在非均匀系统中的应用。

title: Nonunitary triplet superconductivity in the Z2 topological metal SrPd2As2
summary: In Z2 topological metals, nontrivial band topology and strong spin-orbit coupling (SOC) impose symmetry constraints that can stabilize unconventional superconducting states, even when thermodynamic probes indicate an isotropic gap. Here, we investigate the superconducting ground state of such a material, SrPd2As2, using muon spin rotation and relaxation (muSR), first-principles calculations, and Ginzburg-Landau analysis. Transverse-field muSR indicates a fully gapped superconducting state below Tc = 0.94 K, while zero-field muSR detects spontaneous internal magnetic fields below Tc, establishing time-reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking. Electronic structure calculations identify SrPd2As2 as a Z2 topological metal with surface states crossing the Fermi level. Standard anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg calculations predict a nodal gap and overestimate Tc, indicating that a purely phonon-mediated pairing mechanism is insufficient. We resolve this apparent contradiction by showing that the interplay of SOC, tetragonal symmetry, and an open Fermi surface topology stabilizes a nonunitary triplet superconducting state whose symmetry-imposed nodes lie in momentum-space regions devoid of electronic states. This yields a fully gapped thermodynamic response while naturally breaking TRS. Our results establish SrPd2As2 as a clean platform for bulk nonunitary triplet pairing and a promising candidate for intrinsic topological superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过μSR、第一性原理计算和Ginzburg-Landau分析，研究了SrPd2As2的超导基态，发现其具有时间反演对称性破缺的全能隙超导态，并揭示了一种非幺正三重态超导配对机制，该机制由自旋-轨道耦合、四方对称性和开放费米面拓扑共同稳定，表现为对称性要求的节点位于无电子态的动量空间区域，从而解释了热力学全能隙响应与TRS破缺并存的看似矛盾的现象。
AI.motivation: 在Z2拓扑金属中，非平庸的能带拓扑和强自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）施加的对称性约束可以稳定非常规超导态，即使热力学探测表明为各向同性能隙。作者旨在研究此类材料SrPd2As2的超导基态，解决其表现出的看似矛盾的现象。
AI.method: 使用μ子自旋旋转和弛豫（muSR）、第一性原理计算和Ginzburg-Landau分析等方法对SrPd2As2的超导基态进行了研究。
AI.result: 横向场μSR显示Tc=0.94 K以下为全开能隙超导态；零场μSR检测到Tc以下的自发内磁场，建立了时间反演对称性（TRS）破缺；电子结构计算将SrPd2As2识别为具有跨越费米能级的表面态的Z2拓扑金属；标准各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg计算预言了一个节点能隙并高估了Tc，表明纯声子介导的配对机制不足。
AI.conclusion: SOC、四方对称性和开放费米面拓扑的相互作用稳定了一个非幺正三重态超导态，其对称性要求的节点位于缺乏电子态的动量空间区域，从而在自然破缺TRS的同时产生全开能隙的热力学响应。该结果确立了SrPd2As2作为体相非幺正三重态配对的干净平台和有前途的本征拓扑超导体候选材料。

title: Spiral and Mixed Plaquette-Dimer Phases in the $S=1$ and $3/2$ Shastry-Sutherland Heisenberg Model
summary: We investigate the ground-state phase diagram of the $S=1$ and $S=3/2$ Heisenberg model on the two-dimensional Shastry-Sutherland lattice (SSL) using density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) and cluster mean-field theory (CMFT). Between the dimer phase and Néel antiferromagnetic phases, we identify two intermediate phases: a mixed plaquette-dimer (MPD) phase and a spiral phase. These phases are characterized via bond energies and spin-spin correlation functions; phase boundaries are located from the ground-state energy derivative and entanglement entropy. The MPD phase exhibits strong intradimer correlations and weak tetramerization on the empty plaquettes, and its transitions to the dimer and spiral phases are first order. Combining our results with the known boundaries for $S=1/2$ and the classical limit $S\to\infty$, we construct a global $S$-$g$ phase diagram. This diagram reveals the progressive suppression of quantum effects with increasing $S$ and offers a theoretical framework for larger-$S$ SSL materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DMRG和CMFT方法研究了二维Shastry-Sutherland晶格上S=1和S=3/2海森堡模型的基态相图，发现了混合plaquette-dimer相和螺旋相两个中间相，并构建了全局S-g相图。
AI.motivation: 探索Shastry-Sutherland晶格上更高自旋（S=1, 3/2）海森堡模型的基态相图，揭示量子效应随自旋增大的演化规律，为更大自旋的SSL材料提供理论框架。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）和团簇平均场理论（CMFT），通过键能和自旋-自旋关联函数表征中间相，利用基态能量导数和纠缠熵确定相边界。
AI.result: 在二聚体相和Néel反铁磁相之间发现两个中间相：混合plaquette-dimer（MPD）相和螺旋相；MPD相表现出强二聚体内关联和空plaquette上的弱四聚化；MPD相与二聚体相、螺旋相之间的相变为一级相变。
AI.conclusion: 结合S=1/2和经典极限S→∞的已知边界，构建了全局S-g相图，揭示了量子效应随S增大而逐步被抑制的规律，为更高自旋SSL材料提供了理论框架。

title: Colossal Type-II Multiferroic Polarization Driven by Collinear Spin Orders
summary: Achieving strong magnetoelectric coupling (MEC) together with large ferroelectric polarization remains a central challenge in type-II multiferroics. In conventional spin-driven multiferroics, the induced polarization is usually mediated by spin-orbit coupling (SOC) or spin-lattice coupling (SLC). Since many representative systems are based on 3d transition-metal ions, where SOC is relatively weak and SLC-induced lattice distortions are often limited, their polarizations are typically much smaller than those of proper ferroelectrics. Moreover, electric polarizations in type-II multiferroics are generally induced by spiral spin orders stabilized by competing magnetic interactions, which often leads to relatively low magnetic transition temperatures. In this Letter, using spin-group symmetry, we propose an SOC- and SLC-independent route to MEC in collinear 3d magnetic systems. We show that, even for a noncentrosymmetric lattice structure, different collinear magnetic configurations can either forbid or allow electric polarization, indicating direct magnetic control of polarization and hence strong MEC. The first-principles calculations excluding SOC on monolayer 2H-VS2 support this picture: a collinear stripy antiferromagnetic order induces an in-plane ferroelectric polarization up to 25.00 μC/cm2, about two orders of magnitude larger than that of typical type-II multiferroics. Furthermore, our microscopic model suggests that the induced polarization originates from SOC-independent p-d hybridization governed by electronic hopping. Our results suggest a possible route toward type-II multiferroics combining strong MEC with large electronic polarization in collinear 3d magnetic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自旋群对称性的新型磁电耦合机制，在共线3d磁体中实现无需自旋-轨道耦合和自旋-晶格耦合的强磁电效应，并在单层2H-VS2中预测了高达25.00 μC/cm²的面内铁电极化，比传统II类多铁材料大两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统II类多铁材料中，磁电耦合通常依赖自旋-轨道耦合或自旋-晶格耦合，导致极化很小（因3d过渡金属SOC弱）且磁转变温度低。亟需探索不依赖SOC/SLC的新磁电耦合机制，以实现强磁电耦合和大铁电极化。
AI.method: 利用自旋群对称性分析，在非中心对称晶格中筛选不同共线磁结构对电极化的允许/禁止关系；通过不含SOC的第一性原理计算验证单层2H-VS2的条纹反铁磁序诱导面内极化；建立基于电子跳迁的p-d杂化微观模型解释极化起源。
AI.result: 单层2H-VS2中条纹反铁磁序诱导出25.00 μC/cm²的面内铁电极化，比典型II类多铁大两个数量级；该极化不依赖SOC，而是源于电子跳迁驱动的p-d杂化。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种在共线3d磁体中实现强磁电耦合+大电子极化II类多铁的新途径，为设计高性能多铁材料提供了新的对称性设计原则。

title: Excitation density controlled regimes of collective light--matter dynamics
summary: Theoretical descriptions of collective light--matter dynamics often rely on the mean-field (MF) or single-excitation (SE) approximations, yet the parameter regimes where they apply are rarely clearly delineated. Here we show that representative limiting regimes are characterized by two independent parameters: the number of molecules $N$ and the excitation number $N_{\rm exc}$. In the Tavis--Cummings model, when $N\gg 1$ and the excitation density $N_{\rm exc} / N \to 0$, MF and SE descriptions agree and yield linear collective dynamics, showing harmonic Rabi oscillations. At finite excitation density ($N_{\rm exc} / N \sim \mathcal{O}(1)$), the large-\(N\) limit remains accurately described by MF dynamics but becomes nonlinear in $N_{\rm exc} / N$, manifested by a Duffing equation for the cavity amplitude with anharmonic Rabi frequency. We further show that cluster expansion systematically restores finite-$N$ correlations beyond MF. When local vibronic interactions are included, the same linear collective limit is reached by both approximations, with SE reaching it through polaron decoupling and MF through linearization. This two-parameter regime map clarifies the limits in which different theoretical descriptions provide controlled descriptions of collective light--matter dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过两个关键参数——分子数N和激发数N_exc，系统划分了Tavis-Cummings模型中平均场（MF）与单激发（SE）近似的适用区间，揭示了不同参数区域下的集体光-物质动力学行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在描述集体光-物质动力学时，广泛使用平均场（MF）或单激发（SE）近似，但两者各自适用的参数范围长期以来缺乏明确界定，容易导致误用。
AI.method: 通过引入分子数N和激发数N_exc两个独立参数，系统分析Tavis-Cummings模型在不同(N, N_exc)区间下的动力学行为，并引入簇展开方法恢复有限N下的关联效应，同时考虑局域振动相互作用的影响。
AI.result: 当N≫1且N_exc/N→0时，MF与SE描述一致，表现为线性集体动力学和谐振拉比振荡；当N_exc/N~O(1)时，大N极限下MF仍准确但变为非线性（Duffing方程描述）；簇展开可恢复有限N关联；振动耦合下两种近似均收敛到相同的线性集体极限。
AI.conclusion: 建立了双参数区间图谱，明确了不同理论近似（MF、SE）在何种参数条件下能够提供受控且可靠的描述，为集体光-物质动力学建模提供了理论指导框架。

title: Quantum Printing: Laguerre-Gaussian Beam Induced Topological Magnetic Textures
summary: Structured light has become a practical tool for controlling matter by applying tailored, space- and time-dependent electromagnetic fields. We show that Laguerre-Gaussian pulses imprint non-collinear magnetic textures via the spatial structure of optical magnetic field. Our route offers a direct spatial selectivity determined by the optical features without relying on material anisotropic interactions. The proposed printing approach does not require interfacial anisotropy or bulk chirality, current-driven torques, or thermal quenching. We use micromagnetic simulations to demonstrate the potential to create topological charge density emerging during the pulse and reveal control through the optical topological properties and polarization. These results suggest structured-light quantum printing as a viable approach for magnonics and motivate studies toward reconfigurable topological textures enabled by ultrafast THz optics and non-thermal control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用拉盖尔-高斯脉冲的结构光磁场直接打印非共线磁纹理，无需材料各向异性或界面效应，通过微磁模拟展示了拓扑电荷密度的产生与控制。
AI.motivation: 传统磁纹理操控依赖材料本征各向异性、界面效应或电流驱动，缺乏直接的空间选择性。本文旨在利用结构光自身的空间特征实现磁性的直接、可重构调控。
AI.method: 使用拉盖尔-高斯脉冲的结构光磁场作为打印工具，通过微磁学模拟研究光场空间结构对磁纹理的 imprint 效应，分析光学拓扑性质与偏振的调控作用。
AI.result: 成功在脉冲作用期间产生拓扑电荷密度，证实了光场空间结构可直接决定磁纹理形态，且控制参数包括光学拓扑荷和偏振态。
AI.conclusion: 结构光量子打印为磁振子学提供了一种可行的新方法，并有望推动基于超快太赫兹光学的可重构拓扑磁纹理研究。

title: Uncovering multi-channel magnetic hopfion annihilation via a single-node, billion-spin-scale atomistic framework
summary: Modern atomistic spin simulations combine long stochastic trajectories, thermodynamic sampling, static optimization and multi-image transition-path workflows, all of which rely on repeated evaluation of spin Hamiltonians and become computationally prohibitive on the large lattices required for three-dimensional magnetic textures. We introduce SpinX, a GPU-native atomistic spin simulation framework built around a unified Hamiltonian interface and multiple user-selectable computational backends. Its core is a crystallographic sublattice decomposition that reformulates translationally invariant spin interactions as multi-channel tensor convolutions, enabling dense, sparse and FFT-based convolution backends, while irregular systems are handled by pair-list evaluation and long-range dipolar fields by reciprocal-space FFT. Implemented in JAX, SpinX supports deterministic and stochastic Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert dynamics, Monte Carlo sampling, static optimization, dynamical spectroscopy and string and geodesic nudged elastic band transition-path calculations on heterogeneous accelerator platforms. A validated mixed-precision mode combines fp32 field evaluation with fp64 spin-state propagation. We validate SpinX against analytical single-spin dynamics, finite-size thermodynamics of bcc Fe and transverse dynamic structure factors. Performance benchmarks show peak throughput exceeding 10 billion spin-site operations per second on a single accelerator and aggregate single-node workloads of over 1 billion atomic spins. Applying this framework to an exchange-stabilized magnetic hopfion, we uncover two competing annihilation channels on a million-spin atomistic lattice: a previously reported axial-collapse pathway and a distinct lateral-rupture pathway with a different transition morphology and activation barrier.(Due to arXiv's limit, the abstract shown here is a shortened version)

AI.tldr: SpinX是一个基于GPU的原初自旋模拟框架，利用晶格子格分解将平移不变的自旋相互作用转化为多通道张量卷积，支持密集、稀疏和FFT等多种计算后端，实现了超过每秒100亿自旋位点操作的高吞吐量，并发现了一种磁跳频子的横向断裂湮灭通道。
AI.motivation: 现代原子自旋模拟需要长时间随机轨迹、热力学采样、静态优化和多路径过渡态计算，这些过程依赖重复的自旋哈密顿量评估，在大规模三维磁结构晶格上计算成本极高，亟需高效的GPU原生加速框架。
AI.method: SpinX框架的核心创新是晶格子格分解，将平移不变的自旋相互作用重写为多通道张量卷积，从而支持密集卷积、稀疏卷积和FFT卷积三种后端；不规则系统采用配对列表评估，长程偶极场采用倒易空间FFT处理；基于JAX实现，支持混合精度（fp32场评估+fp64态传播）。
AI.result: 在单加速器上峰值吞吐量超过每秒100亿自旋位点操作，单节点支持超过10亿原子自旋；对百万自旋的交换稳定磁跳频子，发现了两种竞争湮灭通道：已有报道的轴向坍缩路径和新发现的横向断裂路径，两者具有不同的跃迁形貌和能垒。
AI.conclusion: SpinX为大规模原子自旋模拟提供了高效的GPU原生解决方案，其子格分解策略和多种卷积后端的设计为处理周期性磁结构提供了通用范式，对新发现的磁跳频子湮灭通道的研究展示了其在三维磁性纹理研究中的实用价值。

title: Streaming Molecular Dynamics Simulation Data for On-the-fly Processing and Analysis
summary: Only a small fraction of the data generated in state-of-the-art all-atom multi-microsecond molecular dynamics (MD) simulations is typically analyzed. With femtosecond integration steps, microsecond simulations generate billions of time steps containing atomic positions, velocities, and forces, often corresponding to petabytes of data. Since this exceeds practical storage capacities, only a subset of frames is usually written to trajectory files at intervals of 10-100 ps. While sufficient for ensemble averages and slow dynamics, this approach discards information on fast processes such as molecular vibrations, solvent dynamics, short-lived transition states, and transport phenomena that are directly related to macroscopic properties and experimental observables. Here, we introduce a streaming framework for MD simulations that provides direct access to all data generated during a running simulation. Instead of writing high-frequency output to disk, the framework enables user-defined analysis and processing routines to access simulation data in real time. To achieve this, we extend the Interactive Molecular Dynamics (IMD) protocol and implement an enhanced version, termed IMDv3, in the MD packages GROMACS, NAMD, and LAMMPS. We further introduce the Python package imdclient, which receives IMDv3 data streams and exposes them to external applications. To maximize usability, we add an imdclient-based reader to the MDAnalysis package, enabling streamed simulation data to be analyzed alongside conventional trajectory files. Benchmark results show that streaming can improve performance compared to simulations with high-frequency trajectory output. Example applications include live monitoring of custom variables, evaluation of velocity time-correlation functions with fast fluctuations, and real-time analysis of membrane pore currents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分子动力学（MD）模拟的流式处理框架，通过扩展IMDv3协议，实现了对全数据（包括原子位置、速度、力等）的实时访问与分析，绕过了传统轨迹文件写入的存储瓶颈，并在GROMACS、NAMD、LAMMPS及MDAnalysis中实现，实验表明该方法性能优于高频轨迹输出，并展示了在实时监控、速度时间相关函数分析和膜孔电流分析等场景的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统MD模拟中，微秒级全原子模拟产生PB级数据，远超存储能力，只能以10-100 ps间隔保存部分帧，导致振动、溶剂动力学、短寿命过渡态等快速过程信息丢失，而这些信息直接关联宏观性质与实验可观测量。
AI.method: 1) 扩展交互式分子动力学（IMD）协议，提出IMDv3版本，在GROMACS、NAMD、LAMMPS中实现；2) 开发Python包imdclient接收IMDv3数据流并暴露给外部应用；3) 在MDAnalysis中添加基于imdclient的读取器，支持流式数据与传统轨迹文件的统一分析。
AI.result: 基准测试表明流式处理在性能上优于高频率轨迹输出的模拟；展示了实时监控自定义变量、评估含快速波动的速度时间相关函数、以及实时分析膜孔电流等应用实例。
AI.conclusion: 该流式框架有效解决了MD模拟中全数据访问与存储瓶颈之间的矛盾，为捕捉快速动力学过程和实现实时分析提供了可行方案，且具有较好的性能优势。

title: Theoretical study of superconductivity in freestanding infinite-layer nickelate membranes under pressure: mitigation of excess correlation enhances $T_c$
summary:
We theoretically investigate a freestanding membrane of infinite-layer nickelate Nd$_{0.85}$Sr$_{0.15}$NiO$_2$ under pressure by constructing a seven-orbital effective model based on first-principles calculations.
  By performing the fluctuation exchange (FLEX) approximation, we demonstrate that the seven-orbital model explains a monotonic increase in $T_c$ reported in a recent experiment. This enhancement of superconductivity is attributed to the mitigation of excessively strong electron correlations caused by exceptionally low valence of Ni atom. Furthermore, we examine the dynamical stability of the crystal structure under pressure through phonon calculation.

AI.tldr: 论文通过构建七轨道有效模型，结合第一性原理计算和FLEX近似，解释了无限层镍酸盐Nd₀.₈₅Sr₀.₁₅NiO₂在压力下超导转变温度T_c单调上升的实验现象，并将这一增强归因于Ni原子极低价态导致的电子关联减弱，同时通过声子计算验证了晶体结构的动力学稳定性。
AI.motivation: 实验观察到Nd₀.₈₅Sr₀.₁₅NiO₂在压力下T_c单调上升，但缺乏理论解释。作者希望从电子结构和电子关联的角度阐明这一现象的微观机制。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算构建七轨道有效模型，采用FLEX近似分析超导转变温度，并通过声子计算评估晶体结构的动力学稳定性。
AI.result: 七轨道模型成功解释了T_c随压力单调增加的实验现象；压力通过缓解Ni原子极低价态引起的过强电子关联来增强超导电性；压力下的晶体结构保持动力学稳定。
AI.conclusion: 压力下超导电性的增强主要源于Ni极低价态导致的电子关联被压力所缓解，为理解无限层镍酸盐超导机制提供了理论依据。

title: Superconfined Antiferromagnons on the Two-Dimensional Penrose Lattice
summary: We find novel confined states in the spin-$S$ nearest-neighbor antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the two-dimensional Penrose lattice. Linear spin waves have massively degenerate eigenstates strictly confined to tricoordinated sites. They contrast with the well-known itinerant analogs in the tight-binding model, where electrons are confined but extended to both tricoordinated and pentacoordinated sites. It is the site potentials in the spin-wave Hamiltonian, originating from Coulomb interactions between electrons, that confine spin waves to minimally coordinated sites only. Confined states in the tight-binding Hamiltonian consist of six types of building blocks, whereas those in the spin-wave Hamiltonian consist of only four of them. Confined spin waves are robust against $1/S$ corrections. Emergent $O(S^{0})$ interactions further confine -- superconfine -- spin waves into two separate groups within tricoordinated sites.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维Penrose晶格上海森堡反铁磁模型中的自旋波局域态，发现其仅存在于三配位点，与紧束缚模型中的电子局域态不同，且对高阶修正具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 探索准晶格点阵中自旋激发（自旋波）的局域化行为，并与已知的紧束缚模型中电子局域态进行对比，揭示二者差异的物理根源。
AI.method: 采用线性自旋波理论分析自旋-S近邻反铁磁海森堡模型，计算自旋波本征态；通过对比紧束缚模型哈密顿量中的位势项，分析局域态的来源；利用1/S展开验证高阶修正下的稳定性。
AI.result: 发现自旋波存在大量简并局域态，严格限制在三配位点（而非紧束缚模型中的三配位和五配位点）；自旋波局域态仅有4种构建模块（紧束缚模型有6种）；发现O(S^0)阶相互作用导致"超局域"现象，将自旋波进一步分为两组。
AI.conclusion: 自旋波局域态与电子局域态的本质差异源于自旋波哈密顿量中来自库仑相互作用的位势项，且这些局域态在1/S修正下保持稳定。

title: Termination-Dependent Surface States and Magnetic Fingerprints of Chiral Helimagnet Cr1/3TaS2
summary: Chiral helimagnets based on intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides, characterized by nano-scale spin ordering, provide a powerful route to engineer chiral spin textures (e.g. the topologically protected magnetic solitons) and emergent electronic functionality at reduced dimensions, where surface and interface states often dominate device operation. However, despite growing interest, direct experimental studies of termination-dependent surface electronic structures and their temperature-driven magnetic evolution remain largely unexplored, hindering a microscopic understanding of the electronic states that is crucial for the development of low-dimensional spintronic devices. Here, for the first time, taking Cr1/3TaS2 as a representative example, we systematically investigate the termination-dependent surface electronic states of the chiral helimagnets and uncover their distinct temperature evolution across the magnetic transition (TC~142K) by combining high-resolution ARPES with a micro-focused beam and surface-state-resolved first-principles calculations. The TaS2-terminated surface hosts folded monolayer-like TaS2 bands under the $\sqrt3\times\sqrt3$ superlattice potential and a shallow triangular electron pocket at the superlattice $\bar K$ point arising from Cr-Ta orbital hybridization. In contrast, the Cr-terminated surface exhibits reconstructed hole pockets with pronounced magnetic band splitting. This splitting disappears above TC and closely follows the chiral helimagnetic order parameter, providing a direct spectroscopic fingerprint of chiral helimagnetic order. In addition, multiple ultranarrow Cr-d-derived surface flat bands are resolved. These findings establish Cr1/3TaS2 as a model system in which surface electronic states are strongly coupled to chiral magnetism, opening new opportunities for chiral spintronic and valleytronic micro/nanodevices.

AI.tldr: 本文以Cr1/3TaS2为模型体系，首次系统研究了手性螺旋磁体中依赖终止面的表面电子态及其在磁相变温度（TC~142K）附近的温度演化，揭示了表面电子态与手性螺旋磁序的强耦合作用，为低维自旋电子学器件提供了新的平台。
AI.motivation: 手性螺旋磁体在低维自旋电子学中具有重要潜力，但表面终止依赖的电子结构及其温度驱动的磁演化尚未被直接实验研究，制约了对关键电子态的微观理解。
AI.method: 结合高分辨率微聚焦ARPES和表面态分辨的第一性原理计算，系统研究Cr1/3TaS2两种终止面（TaS2终止面和Cr终止面）的电子态及其随温度的演化。
AI.result: TaS2终止面出现折叠的单层类TaS2能带和浅三角形电子口袋；Cr终止面出现重构的空穴口袋并表现出显著的磁能带劈裂，该劈裂在TC以上消失且与手性螺旋磁序参量一致，同时观测到多个超窄Cr-d起源的表面平带。
AI.conclusion: Cr1/3TaS2是表面电子态与手性磁性强耦合的模型体系，为手性自旋电子学和谷电子学微纳器件开辟了新机遇。

title: A PEMFC-based combined cooling heating and power (CCHP) system with flexible energy supply: Thermodynamic and economic analyses
summary: Proton exchange membrane fuel cell (PEMFC) systems offer a key approach to hydrogen utilization, and PEMFC-based combined cooling, heating, and power (CCHP) systems pave the way for an efficient and clean energy supply to buildings. In conventional PEMFC-CCHP systems, the heating/cooling capacity and electrical power output are strongly coupled, making it difficult to meet diverse energy demands. This paper presents a novel energy system that integrates an organic Rankine cycle and an absorption heat pump in a parallel configuration, which enables flexible regulation of electricity-cooling capacities in summer and electricity-heating capacities in winter by adjusting the splitting ratio of the waste heat. The impacts of the splitting ratio and key operating parameters on thermodynamic performance and economic performance are quantitatively evaluated. The results show that the ORC can improve electrical efficiency by 2.19 percentage points in summer and 2.78 percentage points in winter. When the current density is fixed at 0.4 A/cm2 and the splitting ratio increases from 0 to 0.5, the cooling capacity of the system varies from 1294 to 647 W, and the heating capacity varies from 2660 to 1330 W. The economic performance is more sensitive to electricity price and hydrogen price than to other parameters, confirmed by their high sensitivity coefficients for net present value (NPV) and internal rate of return (IRR). This system possesses excellent thermodynamic and economic properties, thereby offering significant potential for reducing building energy consumption and carbon emissions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成有机朗肯循环（ORC）和吸收式热泵（AHP）的并联式PEMFC-CCHP新型能源系统，通过调节废热分流比实现电-冷/电-热容量的灵活调控，并对其热力学和经济性能进行了定量评估。
AI.motivation: 传统PEMFC-CCHP系统的加热/制冷容量与电力输出强耦合，难以满足建筑多样化的能源需求，因此需要一种能够灵活调节电-冷、电-热比例的新系统架构。
AI.method: 提出将有机朗肯循环（ORC）和吸收式热泵（AHP）以并联方式集成，通过调整废热分流比（splitting ratio）来独立调节夏季的制冷容量和冬季的供热容量，并定量分析了分流比及关键运行参数对热力学和经济性能的影响。
AI.result: ORC可使夏季电效率提升2.19个百分点，冬季提升2.78个百分点；在电流密度0.4 A/cm²、分流比从0增至0.5时，制冷容量从1294 W降至647 W，制热容量从2660 W降至1330 W；经济性能对电价和氢价最为敏感。
AI.conclusion: 该系统具有优异的热力学和经济性能，在降低建筑能耗和碳排放方面具有显著潜力。

title: High-fidelity EDSR in Si/SiGe Wiggle Wells
